authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife
USDA Forest Service, Lake Tahoe Basin Management Unit

sources.title: CCR T14 §5.85(a)(1) — Trout, General Statewide Regulations (inland lakes, reservoirs, and ponds)
sources.quotedText: All inland lakes, reservoirs, and ponds, including those on private lands, are open to fishing all year with a five-trout daily bag limit and ten-trout possession limit.

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.40 — Alphabetical List of Hatchery Trout, Hatchery Steelhead, and Salmon Waters with Special Fishing Regulations (Round Lake not listed)
CCR T14 §7.50 — Alphabetical List of Trout Waters with Special Fishing Regulations (Round Lake not listed)
2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (Updated 06/01/2026)
sources.quotedText: All inland lakes, reservoirs, and ponds, including those on private lands, are open to fishing all year with a five-trout daily bag limit and 10 trout possession limit.

sources.title: California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: Round Lake | El Dorado County | Tahoe Rim Trail — sierrafish.com
sources.quotedText: Round Lake is accessible via the Tahoe Rim Trail starting at the Big Meadow trailhead near Luther Pass on Highway 89. The trail arrives at Round Lake's north side roughly 3 miles from the trailhead.

sources.title: Round Lake | El Dorado County | Tahoe Rim Trail — Fishing report — sierrafish.com
sources.quotedText: We fished Round Lake hard for two days from the peninsula that was near our campsite. We did not raise any bites using all types of flies and hardware. A few fish were jumping but they weren't interested in our offerings.

sources.title: Off-the-grid angling: Backcountry lakes near Tahoe perfect for fishing — Tahoe Daily Tribune
sources.quotedText: Located in the El Dorado National Forest near South Lake Tahoe, Round Lake is best accessed from the Big Meadow trailhead located off of Highway 89 near Luther Pass ... a great spot to snag native Lahontan cutthroat, among other varieties of trout.

sources.title: Big Meadow Trailhead to Dardanelles Lake Hiking Trail — Hiking Project
Meiss Country — Lake Tahoe Basin Management Unit, USDA Forest Service
sources.quotedText: Meiss Country is a primitive, roadless area located on National Forest lands south of the Lake Tahoe Basin and offers a complete wilderness-like experience with beautiful forest meadows, picturesque mountain lakes, and wonderful scenic vistas.

sources.title: Round Lake Topo Map, El Dorado County, CA (Echo Lake Area) — TopoZone
sources.quotedText: Round Lake, El Dorado County, California, on the Echo Lake USGS 7.5' quadrangle, at approximately 38.7500585 N, -120.0060432 W, elevation approximately 8,045 feet.

parameters.note: Round Lake is not listed in CCR §7.40(b) or §7.50(b), so it falls under the general statewide lake regulation in §5.85(a)(1).

regulations.humanSummary: Open all year (general statewide lake regulation; not listed as a special-regulation water)
regulations.verbatimText: All inland lakes, reservoirs, and ponds, including those on private lands, are open to fishing all year with a five-trout daily bag limit and ten-trout possession limit.

parameters.counting_rule: General statewide trout limit for inland lakes, reservoirs, and ponds: five-trout daily bag limit and ten-trout possession limit.

regulations.humanSummary: 5 trout daily bag limit, 10 trout possession limit
regulations.verbatimText: All inland lakes, reservoirs, and ponds, including those on private lands, are open to fishing all year with a five-trout daily bag limit and ten-trout possession limit.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.
